arts.ttl: Man Utd thrash Bournemouth to keep up perfect pre-season record - 5 talking points
arts.sum: MANCHESTER UNITED 4-1 BOURNEMOUTH: The Red Devils thrashed their fellow Premier League side in wet and wild conditions in Chicago, as Ruben Amorim's resurgent side maintained their winning form on their US pre-season tour

arts.ttl: Højlund scores in United's rout over Bournemouth
Man Utd put four past Bournemouth in Chicago even without new signings
arts.sum: Manchester United produced a dominant display in difficult conditions to beat Bournemouth 4-1 in the Premier League Summer Series in Chicago.

arts.ttl: 'Really sharp' | Hojlund's delicate header puts United in front against Bournemouth
arts.sum: The perfect start for Manchester United as Rasmus Hojlund meets Patrick Dorgu's cross with a delicate header

arts.ttl: How to watch Man Utd vs Bournemouth: TV channel, live stream and kick-off time
arts.sum: Manchester United and Bournemouth face off in the Premier League Summer Series mini-tournament in the United States on Thursday, as both sides ready themselves for the new season

arts.ttl: How to watch Manchester United vs Bournemouth: TV channel and live stream for tonight
arts.sum: A top of the table clash awaits in the Premier League Summer Series
